cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out who Claire ends up with after all these partner swaps. Let me start by listing the initial pairings. So, the original partners are: - Alice (A) with Helga (H) - Bob (B) with Jamie (J) - Claire (C) with Ophelia (O) - Dave (D) with Karl (K) - Eve (E) with Rodrigo (R) Now, the problem says there are several steps where partners are switched. Let me go through each step one by one and track the changes. Maybe I can make a list after each step to keep track. First step: Eve and Bob switch partners. So before this, Eve is with R and Bob is with J. After swapping, Eve would be with Jamie, and Bob would be with Rodrigo. Let me write that down: After first swap: - A-H - B-R - C-O - D-K - E-J Second step: Dave and Claire switch partners. Originally (before this step), Dave
